phrases.intent_en: Ask which pharmacy is on duty now
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿sabe qué farmacia está de guardia?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, SAH-beh keh far-mah-SEE-ah eh-STAH deh GWAR-dyah?

likely_response.local: Farmàcia Plaça del Vi, a dos calles.
likely_response.pronunciation: FAHRM THEE-ah PLAH AH DEHL BEE AH DOHS KAHL-lehs
likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the sign on the door.

responses.english: It is indicated on the sign on the door.
responses.phonetic: FAHRM THEE-ah PLAH AH DEHL BEE AH DOHS KAHL-lehs
responses.french: Farmàcia Plaça del Vi, a dos calles.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the consultation counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de consultas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOH-deh es-TA el mos-tra-DOR de kon-SOOL-tas?

likely_response.local: Tras el expositor de vitaminas, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: TRAHS EHL ehks-poh-see-TOHR DEH bee-tah-MEE-nahs AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, on the left of the hallway.

responses.english: At the back, on the left of the hallway.
responses.phonetic: TRAHS EHL ehks-poh-see-TOHR DEH bee-tah-MEE-nahs AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Tras el expositor de vitaminas, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they have specific medication in stock
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen este medicamento específico en stock?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, TYE-nen ES-te me-dee-ka-MEN-to es-pe-see-FEE-ko en stock?

likely_response.local: Sí, hay disponibilidad en el almacén.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ AHY dee-spoh-nee-bee-lee-DAHD EHN EHL ahl-mah-THÉN
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is availability in the warehouse.

responses.english: Yes, there is availability in the warehouse.
responses.phonetic: SÍ AHY dee-spoh-nee-bee-lee-DAHD EHN EHL ahl-mah-THÉN
responses.french: Sí, hay disponibilidad en el almacén.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up a prescription
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger mi receta médica?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-koh-HEHR mee reh-SEH-tah meh-DEE-kah?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador central, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR thehnt-RAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the central counter, on the right.

responses.english: At the central counter, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR thehnt-RAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En el mostrador central, a la derecha.
